measure.script: $names = @('node','cmd','conhost'); $result = @{}; foreach ($n in $names) { $procs = Get-Process -Name $n -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; $result[$n] = @{ count = @($procs).Count; workingSetMB = [math]::Round((@($procs | Measure-Object WorkingSet64 -Sum).Sum / 1MB), 1) } }; $result | ConvertTo-Json -Compress

sampleOnAlert.script: Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "Name='node.exe' OR Name='cmd.exe' OR Name='conhost.exe'" | Select-Object -First 8 ProcessId, ParentProcessId, Name, CommandLine | ConvertTo-Json -Compress
